description: Light WorldNav vision tier baked into the RunPod Serverless 4090 flex image. Chosen so cold-start reads weights from local image layers (no network volume), fits in 24 GB VRAM, and only includes ungated / permissively-licensed models. Heavy diffusion/transformer weights (Qwen editor, Wan base, WorldStereo DMD, gated tencent/HY-World-2.0) are intentionally NOT baked — they stay on the A100 pod path via the encrypted network volume (see docs/gpu-cost-strategy-runbook.md).

DiffusionWave/sam3.license: ungated mirror of SAM3 (facebook/sam3 is HF-gated); byte-identical safetensors
DiffusionWave/sam3.note: Mirror is public/ungated so it is safe to bake. If provenance changes, fall back to runtime pull from the private cache.

Qwen/Qwen-Image-Edit-2509.reason: ~58 GB layer; ~40 GB VRAM (needs A6000/A100); A100 pod path

Wan-AI/Wan2.1-I2V-14B-480P-Diffusers.reason: WorldStereo base transformer; multi-GPU/80 GB; A100 pod path

tencent/HY-World-2.0.reason: gated / license-controlled (geo-block); keep on private network volume, never in a portable image
